mapper.select:
SELECT tcm_tar_id AS tcmTarId, gene_entrez_id AS geneEntrezId, COALESCE(symbol, '') AS symbol, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(uniprot_id), '#N/A'), NULL) AS uniprotId, COALESCE(ensembl_id, '') AS ensemblId, COALESCE(description, '') AS description, COALESCE(type_of_gene, '') AS typeOfGene FROM targets
(symbol LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR uniprot_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id

SELECT tcm_tar_id AS tcmTarId, gene_entrez_id AS geneEntrezId, COALESCE(symbol, '') AS symbol, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(uniprot_id), '#N/A'), NULL) AS uniprotId, COALESCE(ensembl_id, '') AS ensemblId, COALESCE(description, '') AS description, COALESCE(type_of_gene, '') AS typeOfGene FROM targets WHERE tcm_tar_id = #{geneId}

SELECT tcm_tar_id AS tcmTarId, gene_entrez_id AS geneEntrezId, COALESCE(symbol, '') AS symbol, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(uniprot_id), '#N/A'), NULL) AS uniprotId, COALESCE(ensembl_id, '') AS ensemblId, COALESCE(description, '') AS description, COALESCE(type_of_gene, '') AS typeOfGene FROM targets WHERE gene_entrez_id = #{entrezId}

SELECT DISTINCT c.inchikey, c.molecular_formula AS molecularFormula, c.molecular_weight AS molecularWeight, c.pubchem_cid AS pubchemCid FROM compound_target_rel ct INNER JOIN tcm_compounds c ON ct.inchikey = c.inchikey WHERE ct.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId} ORDER BY c.molecular_weight

SELECT DISTINCT d.disease_id AS diseaseId, d.disease_name AS diseaseName, d.source FROM disease_gene_rel dg INNER JOIN diseases d ON dg.disease_id = d.disease_id WHERE dg.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId} ORDER BY d.disease_name

SELECT DISTINCT s.tcm_syndrome_id AS tcmSyndromeId, s.syndrome_name_zh AS syndromeNameZh, s.syndrome_english AS syndromeEnglish, sg.source FROM syndrome_gene_rel sg INNER JOIN tcm_syndromes s ON sg.tcm_syndrome_id = s.tcm_syndrome_id WHERE sg.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId} ORDER BY s.syndrome_name_zh
SELECT DISTINCT p.pathway_id AS pathwayId, p.name, p.source FROM pathway_target_rel pt INNER JOIN pathways p ON pt.pathway_id = p.pathway_id WHERE pt.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId} ORDER BY p.name

SELECT DISTINCT ph.phenotype_id AS phenotypeId, ph.phenotype_name AS phenotypeName, ph.source FROM phenotype_target_rel pt INNER JOIN phenotypes ph ON pt.phenotype_id = ph.phenotype_id WHERE pt.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId} ORDER BY ph.phenotype_name

SELECT DISTINCT ws.wm_symptom_id AS wmSymptomId, ws.symptom_name AS symptomName, ws.umls_id AS umlsId FROM wm_symptom_gene_rel wsg INNER JOIN wm_symptoms ws ON wsg.wm_symptom_id = ws.wm_symptom_id WHERE wsg.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId} ORDER BY ws.symptom_name
